name: Extract function parameters into a config struct
description: The function `init_service` in src/lib.rs takes 5 parameters: host, port, timeout_ms, max_connections, debug_mode. Refactor it to accept a single `ServiceConfig` struct instead. The struct should be public, have named fields, and derive Debug and Clone. The function signature should become `pub fn init_service(config: ServiceConfig) -> Result<(), String>`.
